name: The Bunker Club
about: The Bunker Club is an upcoming indoor golf venue in Royal Oak, Michigan, featuring premium TrackMan simulators in a high-end, clubhouse-inspired atmosphere. The venue offers both hourly bookings and 24/7 memberships, targeting golfers seeking a serious practice environment or a place to socialize. Currently in development, it emphasizes a premium experience with smart-access technology and a focus on community, designed to raise the standard for indoor golf in Southeast Michigan.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan 4 simulators for the most accurate data and performance analysis
24/7 access for flexible practice sessions, ideal for serious golfers with busy schedules
High-end, clubhouse-inspired atmosphere designed for both focused practice and social play
Exclusive founding memberships offering lifetime perks and early access benefits
Located in Royal Oak, Michigan, serving the Southeast Michigan area with a focus on quality

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Players must bring their own golf clubs to use at The Bunker Club, as the venue does not mention club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The Bunker Club offers a full bar and kitchen food, but policies on outside food and drink are not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, as the focus is on TrackMan simulator use for practice or play with flexible session lengths.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Bunker Club is not marketed as kid-friendly; its atmosphere and focus are directed towards serious golfers and adults.
